title: Better Rivulet
description: Add better rivers to the original version
body:
This is a datapack that adds better rivers to the original version.

 # 💡Features:
- Generate better river curves

# 🖼️Screenshots
### vanilla Overworld
![vanilla Overworld](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75b05c672f9e573fc1c360466264fb792061aab3.png)
### Better Rivulet
![Better Rivulet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f177876c7c93b072165aa44cdc94386785f01ea1.png)
### This data package supports custom functions.
- The modified document has been placed in the zip data package, you can open and edit it yourself (I'm sorry it's only in Chinese, I don't speak much English, so please translate it yourself).
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22eca9b07caf106d011f6e69005ef84b23a5a0fe.png)
